name: YOUNGER || Minerva Phaendris
description:
—admirer, from me to you.

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

it’s not often Minerva finds herself in a situation like this. heart pounding, palms sweating. it feels like she’s been dipped in cold and hot water at the same time.

so she hopes to god that she doesn’t come across as unsettling when the woman of her dreams is standing right there in front of her, expectant eyes making her shoulders tense.

[before marriage]
